debug_info.goal:

p : ↑unitInterval
P : Measure Ω
hX : @ProbabilityTheory.IsBernoulliOn ι Ω m X u p P
⊢ iIndepFun (fun i ω => i ∈ X ω) P

failed_attempts:
by

  convert Measure.infinitePi_pi {i} f (fun j _ ↦ hf j)
